name: Follow-Up Actions Upon Form Submission
body: [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "You can configure automated follow-up actions using Marketing Cloud's Acquisition Builder to create seamless lead capture and engagement workflows. Understanding these action types helps optimize your website conversion process by providing multiple options for responding to visitor interactions, from form submissions to personalized content delivery."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Acquisition Builder actions enable more sophisticated lead nurturing by allowing you to create custom workflows that respond to visitor behavior with relevant actions. When properly implemented, these automated sequences can substantially improve conversion rates by delivering timely, relevant experiences that guide visitors through your marketing funnel."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "HTTP POST"}], "data-id": "http-post"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Use this action when you want to POST form data from your lightbox to your own server. The data will be sent as application/x-www-form-urlencoded content type to the URL endpoint that you specify. Typically, you'll connect the HTTP POST action to the right of the Display Popup action. When you do, the form fields from your selected lightbox in the Display Popup action will automatically appear as selection options in the HTTP POST action."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "You can also add more parameters and values. For example, suppose you have set the lightbox to only appear from a specific referred URL. You can then pass the referred URL as a parameter value to your system."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Subscribe Contact"}], "data-id": "subscribe-contact"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The Subscribe Contact action, together with the Display Popup action, is one compelling reason why Maropost for Marketing's Acquisition Builder is a better solution than any 3rd-party. The lightbox form data goes directly into your Maropost for Marketing account. You don't have to worry about integrating Maropost with your 3rd-party provider. It's all built into the platform."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Here is where you will map the form fields from your lightbox form to the custom fields that you've created in your Maropost for Marketing account. You will also specify which list(s) you want to subscribe the new contact to."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Connect the Subscribe Contact action to the right of the Display Popup action. When you do, the form fields from your selected lightbox in the Display Popup action will automatically appear as selection options in the Subscribe Contact action."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Display Popup"}], "data-id": "display-popup"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Use this action to specify which Acquisition Form you want to appear as a lightbox in the site visitor's browser window. You can specify where on the screen you want the lightbox to appear, and also whether you want any motion from the left, right, top, or bottom. You can also set the option to suspend display of the lightbox to the same site visitor for a period of time, or even to never display it ever again, as long as the visitor doesn't clear their browser cookies in the meantime."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Embedded Form"}], "data-id": "embedded-form"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Use this action when you want to use an embedded form to appear inline with the content of your web page. You "}, {"text": "MUST", "bold": true}, {"text": " use an Acquisition Form that you've created as an embedded form."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Replace HTML"}], "data-id": "replace-html"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Use this action if you want to replace content on your web page when a site visitor submits (or cancels) a lightbox form. Reference the HTML element by its CSS class, ID, or tag name, and then provide the text that you want the HTML element to have instead. An example of where you could use this is to reveal a coupon code hidden from display until after the site visitor signs up for your newsletter."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Send Notification"}], "data-id": "send-notification"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "This action will send an email notification to the email address(es) you specify in response to some action that the site visitor has taken with the lightbox."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Custom Javascript"}], "data-id": "custom-javascript"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "We've provided this action for you to customize further your Acquisition Builder in case you need some action that none of the existing ones provide. For example, you can use this action to make an AJAX call in response to an action that the site visitor has taken with the lightbox."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "HTTP Redirect"}], "data-id": "http-redirect"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "This action will redirect the site visitor's browser to the URL that you specify. This is typically used to redirect the site visitor to a landing page on your site after submitting the lightbox form. This action includes the option to include the lightbox form fields as query string parameters appended to the redirected URL."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Close Popup"}], "data-id": "close-popup"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "This action is typically the final action of the typical triad of [Display Popup] -> [Subscribe Contact] -> [Close Popup]. When you connect it to the right side of a [Display Popup] action, the form selected in the Close Popup action will default to the one that you've selected in the Display Popup action."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Close Embedded Form"}], "data-id": "close-embedded-form"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Use this action to close an embedded form that is displayed on your web page after the site visitor submits (or cancels) the form."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Append HTML"}], "data-id": "append-html"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "This action is the companion to the Replace HTML action. In this case, rather than replace the entire HTML of an element, you want to append something, such as additional text, to it."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Open in New Window"}], "data-id": "open-in-new-window"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Use this action together with the HTTP Redirect action when you want to redirect the site visitor to a new landing page that is displayed in a new browser window."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Show/Hide Element"}], "data-id": "show-hide-element"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "This action is another one that is good to use if you want to \"reveal\" a coupon code on your web page after the site visitor signs up for your newsletter. Reference the HTML element by its CSS class, ID, or tag name."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Related Articles"}], "data-id": "related-articles"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Mobile & Multichannel:", "bold": true}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/998-creating-sms-campaigns", "children": [{"text": "Creating Sms Campaigns"}]}, {"text": " - Expand your mobile messaging with SMS campaigns"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/814-bulk-messaging-examples", "children": [{"text": "Bulk Messaging Examples"}]}, {"text": " - Effective multi-channel messaging strategies"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/985-create-social-media-content", "children": [{"text": "Create Social Media Content"}]}, {"text": " - Coordinate mobile and social media campaigns"}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Campaign Management:", "bold": true}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/984-connecting-to-a-social-media-account", "children": [{"text": "Connecting To A Social Media Account"}]}, {"text": " - Integrate social channels with mobile campaigns"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/815-bulk-messaging-personalised-email-headers", "children": [{"text": "Bulk Messaging Personalised Email Headers"}]}, {"text": " - Personalize cross-channel messaging"}]}]}]}]
